config.script:
system.perspective.print("start-->")
	from java.util import Date
	from java.text import SimpleDateFormat
	
	loader = self.parent.parent.getChild("LoaderCnt")
	tableComp = self.parent.parent.getChild("TableCnt").getChild("Table")
	msgStatus = self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStatus")
	system.perspective.print("line 9")
	
	loader.position.height = 460
	loader.meta.visible = True
	self.parent.parent.getChild("TableCnt").position.height = 0
	self.props.enabled = False 
	system.perspective.print("line 15")   
	
	
	StartStation = self.getSibling("stationDD").props.value
	EndStation = self.getSibling("endStationDD").props.value
	AreaName = self.getSibling("areaDD").props.value
	LineName = self.getSibling("lineDD").props.value
	startDate=self.getSibling("startDate").props.value
	endDate=self.getSibling("endDate").props.value
	system.perspective.print(StartStation)
	system.perspective.print(EndStation)
	system.perspective.print(AreaName)
	system.perspective.print(LineName)
	system.perspective.print("startDate")
	system.perspective.print(startDate)
	
	
	system.perspective.print("endDate")
	system.perspective.print(endDate)
	
	if not StartStation or not EndStation or not AreaName or not LineName or not startDate or not endDate:
		setMessage("Error", "Please select all the required values (Area, Line, StartStation, EndStation, startDate, endDate ).")
		loader.meta.visible = False
		loader.position.height = 0
		self.props.enabled = True
		return
	system.perspective.print("outside Try-->")
	
	try:
	 
		date_format = SimpleDateFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
		StartDate = date_format.format(startDate)
		EndDate = date_format.format(endDate)
		parameters = {
		    'StartStation': StartStation,
		    'EndStation': EndStation,
		    'startDate': StartDate,
		    'endDate':EndDate
		}
		system.perspective.print("line 52%s"%startDate)
		system.perspective.print("param passed--->")
		system.perspective.print(parameters)
		data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Report/WIPReport/WIP/getWIPData", parameters)
		system.perspective.print("Data Fetched")
		
		if not data:
		    setMessage("Success", "No data found for the selected filters.")
		else:
		    tableComp.props.data = data
		    setMessage("Success", "Data retrieved successfully.")
	
	except Exception as e:
	    # Handle exceptions
	    setMessage("Error", "Error retrieving data: {}".format(str(e)))
	
	finally:
	    # Ensure the loader is hidden and the button is re-enabled
	    loader.meta.visible = False
	    loader.position.height = 0
	    self.parent.parent.getChild("TableCnt").position.height = 500
	    self.props.enabled = True
	
	
def setMessage(status, message):
	    system.perspective.sendMessage(
	        messageType="setMessage",
	        payload={
	            "message": message,
	            "status": status
	        },
	        scope="view"
	    )

self.getSibling("endDate").props.value=''
	    self.getSibling("startDate").props.value=''
	    self.getSibling("areaDD").props.value=''
	    self.getSibling("lineDD").props.value=''
	    self.getSibling("stationDD").props.value=''
	    self.getSibling("endStationDD").props.value=''
	    self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStatus").props.text=''
	    self.parent.parent.getChild("TableCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=''
	    self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStatus").meta.visible=False
	    msgStrip = self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStrip")
	    msgStrip.props.text = ''  # Clear the text
	    msgStrip.props.style = {}  # Reset the style to an empty dictionary

import system
    
    
    # Get the table data from the component
   
    tableData = self.parent.parent.getChild("TableCnt").getChild("Table").props.data
    
    if tableData:
        # Extract headers dynamically from table columns
        headers = list(tableData.getColumnNames()) if tableData.getRowCount() > 0 else []
        

        rows = []
        for row in tableData:
            rows.append([row[col] for col in headers])
        
        # Create a dataset from headers and rows
        dataset = system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, rows)
        
        # Convert the dataset to CSV format
        csvData = system.dataset.toCSV(dataset, showHeaders=True)
        
        # Specify the file path and write CSV data to a file
        filePath = system.file.getTempFile("WIPReport.csv")
        system.file.writeFile(filePath, csvData)
        
        # Read the file as bytes for download
        fileName = "WIPReport.csv"
        csvBytes = system.file.readFileAsBytes(filePath)
        
        # Trigger the download in the Perspective view
        system.perspective.download(fileName, csvBytes)
        
        message = 'WIP data downloaded successfully'
        setMessage("Success",message)
    else:
        message = 'Please first retrieve data and then download the file'
        setMessage("Error",message)
        
def setMessage(status,message):
      	system.perspective.sendMessage(

         		payload={
              	"message": message,
              	"status": status
          	},
          	scope="view"  
      	)

messageHandlers.script:
# Get the parameters from the message
	message = payload['message']  
	status = payload['status']
	
	# Update the Text Field's text
	self.props.text = message
	self.meta.visible=True
	# Apply the style class (from the payload or a default value)
	self.props.style.classes = "Project_VECV/Reports/successMsg" if status=='Success' else "Project_VECV/Common/StatusBlinking/Hold"
